Crafted from sustainable, premium cotton yarn, these handmade coasters are not only durable, reusable, and washable but also add a touch of vintage charm to any table setting. Designed with a beautiful floral pattern, these coasters are ideal for protecting your dining table and kitchen table from scratches while accommodating cups, glasses, and plates. Their old-fashioned and vintage aesthetic makes them a delightful addition to your craft dining table, ensuring your decor stands out. Kilofly's small crochet doilies make ideal coasters, making them perfect for special occasions like Christmas, housewarmings, or birthdays. Gift them as a thoughtful present or use them to create a cute garland for your parties or seasonal decor for holidays. Embrace this vintage-inspired decor item and enjoy the perfect blend of practicality and beauty in your home! For this crochet design, we have these color options: white, beige, pink, purple.
